text.headline: M.Chem Chemistry — University of Durham
text.text: Studied M.Chem (hons) Chemistry at the University of Durham, with a 4th-year dissertation on photoactive complexes of multimetallic assemblies.

text.headline: Ph.D. Physical Chemistry — University of Durham
text.text: Doctoral research into highly conjugated arylene ethylene systems, combining DFT modelling, organic synthesis, and photophysical spectroscopy.

text.headline: Post-Doctoral Research Associate — Johnson Matthey / Durham University
text.text: Modelled, prepared and analysed novel catalyst bed materials at the intersection of industry and academia.

text.headline: Post-Doctoral Research Associate — Heidelberg University
text.text: Extended PhD research programme in Germany. Mentored postgraduates and consulted on multiple projects, including planning, commissioning and procurement of a new €2Mn organic electronics development laboratory.

text.headline: Post-Doctoral KTS Fellowship — Proctor & Gamble / Durham University
text.text: Developed hardware and software for real-time multi-spectrum video analysis to identify product defects at the manufacturing line.

text.headline: Senior Scientist – Organic Materials' Integration — Centre for Process Innovation
text.text: Lead analyst and process development scientist on an iUK-funded (~£500K) multi-party project to develop the UK's first fully organic QVGA display (OLED). Developed bespoke Python scripts for automated analysis and high-volume wafer test data reporting.

media.credit: Centre for Process Innovation — National Formulation Centre

text.headline: Senior Research Scientist – Informatics — Centre for Process Innovation
text.text: Consulting tech lead and analyst on ERF grant scheme projects spanning SMEs to global corporations. PM on a £250K novel energy capture material feasibility trial and technical lead on a £400K data capture platform implementation.

text.headline: Data Scientist / Senior Data Scientist – Operations — Pragmatic Semiconductor
text.text: Applied statistical and ML techniques across a ~100-step semiconductor manufacturing process. Built predictive maintenance models (ARIMA/association rules) and ensemble models (Random Forest) for causal inference — directly contributing to >40% yield improvement in a single month. Devised the in-house Python module for operational data access. Deployed Tableau across OPS and R&D. Won the 'Above & Beyond' internal award.

text.headline: Head of Manufacturing Intelligence — Pragmatic Semiconductor
text.text: Built and lead a multifunctional data team (DBA · DE · DA · DS · MLEng) across the UK and Europe, with a strong focus on diversity and psychological safety. Directed CNN-based wafer map classification, a RAG/LLM pilot, self-service data portal API, and C-Suite KPI dashboards. Implemented DevOps/MLOps practices and supported successful ISO 27001 accreditation.
